agents.name: Arbiter
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Neutral decision synthesizer. Frames strategic questions, drives multi-perspective debate, and synthesizes competing viewpoints into actionable, ranked recommendations with documented dissent.

agents.name: Advocate
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: User voice and behavior reality analyst. Grounds every proposal in real user behavior, adoption friction, and workflow integration.

agents.name: Architect
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Feasibility and systems thinking strategist. Grounds proposals in technical reality, operational complexity, and system durability.

agents.name: Catalyst
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Acceleration and monetization strategist. Pushes for commercial velocity, revenue capture, and shipping speed.

agents.name: Navigator
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Market positioning and competitive timing strategist. Maps competitive landscapes and identifies timing windows for go-to-market viability.

agents.name: Pathfinder
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Asymmetric opportunity hunter and 10x thinker. Challenges incrementalism and identifies step-function moves where upside dwarfs downside.

agents.name: Provocateur
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Assumption-breaker and stress-tester. Challenges consensus, surfaces hidden assumptions, and forces the assembly to prove it is not fooling itself.

agents.name: Sentinel
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Protection and durability strategist. Safeguards long-term value, user trust, and retention against proposals that erode compounding assets.

agents.name: Strategist
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Problem selection and sequencing specialist. Ensures the team works on the right problems in the right order based on impact-per-effort.

agents.name: Auditor
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Retrospective analyst and institutional memory. Tracks decision patterns, surfaces historical precedent, and ensures the organization learns from past decisions.

agents.name: Operator
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Execution reality analyst. Grounds every plan in team capacity, dependency chains, and delivery risk to test whether proposals can actually be built.

agents.name: Steward
agents.author: aos-harness
agents.description: Ethics, compliance, and governance guardian. Prevents decisions that create legal, regulatory, or reputational exposure.

profiles.name: Strategic Council
profiles.author: aos-harness
profiles.description: Multi-perspective strategic deliberation. A neutral Arbiter orchestrates 11 specialist agents who debate, challenge, and stress-test from opposing perspectives.

profiles.name: Architecture Review
profiles.author: aos-harness
profiles.description: Technical architecture evaluation. Assesses system design decisions against feasibility, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

profiles.name: Delivery Ops
profiles.author: aos-harness
profiles.description: Product delivery orchestration. Plans and sequences feature delivery with execution reality checks and go/no-go criteria.

profiles.name: Incident Response
profiles.author: aos-harness
profiles.description: Rapid multi-perspective incident analysis. Analyzes root causes, failure modes, operational impact, and prevention strategies.

profiles.name: Security Review
profiles.author: aos-harness
profiles.description: Security assessment and remediation planning. Identifies vulnerabilities and produces a prioritized remediation plan with a risk matrix.

domains.name: Fintech & Financial Services Context
domains.author: aos-harness
domains.description: Domain pack for financial services, payments, lending, and investment platforms. Injects fintech-specific lexicon, compliance standards, and agent overlays.

domains.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences Context
domains.author: aos-harness
domains.description: Domain pack for clinical decision support, patient safety, and regulatory compliance (HIPAA, FDA, IRB).

domains.name: Personal Decisions
domains.author: aos-harness
domains.description: Domain pack for personal and life decisions. Strips business metrics and adds life-stage context, emotional impact assessment, and personal values alignment.

domains.name: Platform Engineering Context
domains.author: aos-harness
domains.description: Domain pack for internal developer platforms, infrastructure, and SRE practices. Injects platform-engineering-specific lexicon and reliability standards.

domains.name: SaaS Business Context
domains.author: aos-harness
domains.description: Domain pack for B2B and B2C SaaS businesses. Injects SaaS-specific lexicon, metrics standards, and agent overlays for subscription-based software decisions.
